[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style portrait shows a person with light blue hair looking forward while holding a white cup near their mouth.

The main subject is a face and upper torso of an anime-style character with straight, shoulder-length light blue hair and bangs, large blue eyes, and a small mouth with a neutral expression. They wear a white garment with a dark blue inner collar and a dark strap-like element over one shoulder. Their right hand holds a white cup close to their lips, while the left hand supports the cup with fingers visible along the side.

The setting appears to be indoors with a softly blurred background in warm brown and light gray tones, creating a shallow depth-of-field effect. Lighting is even and bright, with no visible weather or outdoor elements.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows an anime-style character holding a white cup close to their mouth. The character faces the viewer with a calm, neutral expression against a blurred indoor background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text found in the screenshot.]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain only an illustration/anime-style image with no readable UI elements or captions.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
